reasoning: Charming chubby creature with clear round-soft toy aesthetic — orange-brown body, cream belly, green eyes, stubby limbs. Personality reads instantly at 4x: sticker-test friendly, non-aggressive, distinctly cute-enemy archetype. Silhouette at 1x is readable as a stocky round biped but slightly mushy due to light belly color merging into the grey bg at small size. On dark bg: excellent contrast and pop, outline crisp. On light bg: orange body holds well but cream belly loses edge definition against the near-white bg, reducing silhouette sharpness. Overall charm is high and the design passes the friendly-toy standard, but light-bg contrast and 1x silhouette need minor edge work to fully pass.
